source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Hint: Please answer the question and provide the correct option letter, e.g., A, B, C, D, at the end.
Question: In the pure inductive component AC circuit shown in figure, it is known that the angular frequency of the power supply is \( \omega \). The correct relationship between \( \dot{U} \) and \( \dot{I} \) is ( )
Choices
A. \( \dot{U} = -j\dot{I}\omega L \)
B. \( \dot{U} = j\dot{I}\omega L \)
C. \( \dot{U} = -j\dot{I} f_x000C_rac{1}{\omega L} \)
D. \( \dot{U} = j\dot{I} frac{1}{\omega L} \)
